title: Interests
text: Been playing since I was seven years old! Formerly, I was the concertmaster of the Michigan Pops Orchestra from 2023-2025. My favorite piece of orchestral music is Sibelius’ Symphony No. 2.

title: Interests
text:
DANCING 💃:
I was trained as a rhythmic gynmast growing up (think ribbons, twirling, and tosses….and less Simone Biles tumbling across the floor…).
In college, as I transitioned to contemporary and jazz dancing, I’ve had to pleasure of choreographing two pieces:

title: Interests
text:
RUNNING 🏃‍♀️:
Work in progress! And I couldn’t have done it without the Nike Run Club. I’ve run a couple of 5Ks in the past, and formally trained for the Ann Arbor Trinity Health Probility 10K in October 2025. Now, my sights are set of the Detroit Half-Marathon in October 2026!

title: Katie Zhao
text: I am a master’s student at the University of Michigan studying biostatistics. Formerly, I spent a lot of time thinking about drug pathways and receptors—and now I’m studying the statistical processes that analyze data and inform our understanding of those pathways and receptors!
